description: Demo for Any Block Carousel Slider

steps.code:
<?php 
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/plugin.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/post.php';

// Activate Plugin
activate_plugin('native-blocks-carousel/any-block-carousel-slider.php');

// Activate Theme
switch_theme('native-blocks-carousel');

// Import content should happen after this or via importWxr step

<?php 
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/post.php';
$home = get_page_by_path('sample-page');
if ($home) {
	update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
	update_option('page_on_front', $home->ID);
}
update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/');
